meta.title: Mark Bogdanov - Cyber Jack of All Trades | IT Project Manager, CTO
meta.description: IT Project Manager, co-founder of itis.team and Such.Digital, founder of DataSuite. IT product development, consulting, mentorship.

hero.name: Mark Bogdanov
hero.description: IT Project Manager • Co-founder of itis.team and Such.Digital • Founder and CTO of DataSuite • Lecturer at SPbSUE

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hi! I'm Mark Bogdanov — an IT professional with years of experience creating high-tech products. My expertise covers project management, mobile app development, XR technologies, and rapid prototyping.
about.text1: Since 2018, I've created over 40 IT products with my team. I'm a co-founder of itis.team and Such.Digital, and the founder of DataSuite — a wearable motion tracking system and finalist of the international ANA Avatar XPRIZE competition.
about.text2: Since 2022, I've been teaching mobile app development at SPbSUE, sharing my experience with students. I actively participate in hackathons (over 16 since 2016) as a participant, expert, and organizer.
about.text3: I've spoken at major events: GeekPicnic, Starcon, VK Fest, SPIEF. I love working with innovative projects at the intersection of technologies and helping newcomers find their path in IT.
